articles.title: 英国小城的故宫特展：如何讲述紫禁城的变迁？
articles.summary: 崔莹：一场介绍故宫历史变迁的特展落脚英国杜伦。在展览筹备之初，策展团队就意识到，他们必须从零开始向当地观众讲述紫禁城的故事，而不是简单地把中文资料翻译成英文。

articles.title: Should you buy Series I bonds as inflation heats up again?
英国皇家艺术研究院夏季大展开启
articles.summary: 静楠：如果说温布尔登代表英国的网球传统，格拉斯顿伯里代表英国的音乐文化，那么皇家艺术研究院夏季大展，则定义了英国人对于“艺术夏天”的想象。

articles.title: I bond vs. high-yield savings account: Which is better for beating inflation?

articles.summary: While the U.S. channels support to tech winners indirectly via incentives, Chinese governments at every level take direct equity stakes.

articles.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
articles.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.

articles.title: Thomson Reuters Announces Voting Results for Election of Directors

articles.title: Stears wants to be Africa’s Bloomberg terminal
articles.summary: As the continent’s markets mature, high-quality financial analysis is more essential than ever

articles.title: Oil prices fall on hopes of U.S.-Iran deal despite Tehran pushback
articles.summary: Oil prices fell on Friday after U.S. President Donald Trump said Washington had reached a framework agreement with Iran, raising hopes that tensions in the Middle East could ease.

articles.title: Fed Up With Food Delivery App Fees & Tips? Barclays Has Terrific News

articles.title: 《主角》的裂缝：忆秦娥算不算自己生命的主角？
articles.summary: 非非马：剧情争议的背后，是两套“成事”观的冲突：一套相信守拙、不争、苦练，等待被看见，被认可，被推举；另一套却相信更为现代的目标管理、自我规划与经营。

articles.title: 特朗普扬言要“全面接管”伊朗主要油气枢纽
articles.summary: 分析人士警告，夺取哈尔克岛将意味着战争大幅升级，使美军面临伤亡风险。

issues: ❌ 准确性严重不足: 仅0%的断言得到验证 (0/1)
warnings: ⚠️ 数据更新于5.9小时前,时效性一般

manual_checklist: 确认 Markdown 报告不是简单复述新闻，而是有清晰结论提炼。
确认没有把新闻中的旧行情数字包装成“基于实时数据”或“现价”。
确认没有把同比、环比、财报增速写成当前实时涨跌。
确认 Judgment Cards 区分了事实、推断、风险。
确认观察项承接了证据不足内容，而不是强行输出确定性结论。
确认建议具有跟踪价值，不是模板化、空泛表述。
确认股票推荐评分章节包含总分、子分、等级、数据完整度与失效条件。
